content: TASK-010 release/demo checkpoint done: added curated default ArchMap samples for the playground and static demo. `DEFAULT_ARCHMAP_SAMPLES`, `DEFAULT_ARCHMAP_SAMPLE_ID`, and `getArchMapSample()` are exported from @archmap/core. The sample selector sits next to Render in `index.html` and `examples/demo.html`, grouped by category, and applies each sample's recommended base view/render mode/add-info overlays. There are 12 lightweight samples spanning product screenflow, SaaS, data platform, multiregion, Android stack, CI/CD, IoT, zero trust, incident response, enterprise network, and AI/RAG. Default sample covers overview/layer/prototype and all Add info overlays. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/samples.test.ts, full npm test, npm run build, browser smoke on 127.0.0.1:5173. Dev server remains running on 127.0.0.1:5173. Remaining release work: final browser/file demo/GitHub Pages smoke, npm publish 0.1.1 by human, create/push v0.1.1 tag, verify CDN/jsDelivr URLs.
